    • e***i (32)- Feedback left by buyer.
      Past 6 months
      Verified purchase
      When I received the pots and pans they were packaged very nicely and securely. As I was taking them out of the boxes I realized I loved everything about them and they were just what I wanted. However the 2qt sauce pan was warped around the top and the lid wouldn't fit. The seller,deals-buy, did not have an extra to replace, so they allowed me to keep the pot and issued a partial refund. The seller was kind, cooperative and easy to do business with. I will shop from this store again. Melissa G
      NutriChef 13Pcs Stylish Nonstick Cookware Heat Resistant Kitchen Pots & Pans Set (#265058995653)
    • 3***g (366)- Feedback left by buyer.
      Past 6 months
      Verified purchase
      Arrived intact, but appeared used/repackaged and color was different than from what was ordered. Still it functioned as presented. I reached out to Seller and was pleased they worked to make it right. Based on this resolution, I would consider purchasing again from this Seller.
      Pyle Wired 6.5" Indoor/Outdoor Waterproof Speakers (Pair) - White PDWR50W (#264697959330)

      Nice beginner guitar with everything you need to get started. Great finish on the real wood. Seller was spot on with the description and it was a fantastic price.
